title: Product Manager — Developer Tools
description: Codeloop builds developer productivity tools used by 80,000 engineers worldwide. We're looking for a Product Manager with a strong technical background to own our IDE integrations and API product surface.
responsibilities: Define and own the roadmap for Codeloop's extension ecosystem and public API
Work directly with engineering leads to scope, prioritise, and ship features
Talk to developers constantly — interviews, surveys, community forums, support tickets
Define success metrics and run structured experiments to validate bets
Write detailed specs, PRDs, and API documentation that engineers love
requirements: 4+ years in product management, at least 2 years on a developer-facing product
Hands-on coding background (can read and write code, understands APIs, SDKs, CLIs)
Experience shipping B2B SaaS products with API or platform components
Strong data skills: comfortable writing SQL, interpreting funnel analytics, A/B results
Excellent written communication — you write clearly and with precision
nice_to_have: Experience with VS Code extensions, JetBrains plugins, or LSP
